acronyms.usage: Steps to solve linear homogeneous recurrences: Check Homogeneity → Determine Order → Apply Method (characteristic equation)

visualTips.visualization: Draw root node (T(n)), split into child nodes (T(n/b)), sum costs at each level

analogies.analogy: Like finding a specific key (particular solution) to open a lock, then using master keys (homogeneous solution) for variations
